title: Container Corporation of India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Container Corporation of India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Warehouse Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
